metadata.title: Complex Energy Sector Cyber Attack Scenario
metadata.author: Cybersecurity Analyst

overview.brief_summary: A sophisticated cyber attack targeting the energy sector, utilizing multiple tactics and techniques to gain unauthorized access, escalate privileges, and exfiltrate sensitive data.

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Target Artifact (Tasks) Credential Store Target System Artifact OS Process Target Artifact (Privileges) Target Artifact (Mechanisms) Target Artifact (Device) User Account Network Traffic File Target Artifact (Alternate)
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method Artificial Intelligence Reg.exe Utility Custom Tool Development Process Injection Modify System Partition Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism User Evasion User Account Authentication (Mechanism) Network Traffic Flow (Mechanism) File Creation (Mechanism) Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol Network Traffic Content (Mechanism)

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attacker uses artificial intelligence to gather information about the target system's tasks and identify potential vulnerabilities.

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attacker uses network sniffing to monitor network traffic and capture sensitive information from the credential store.

stage.name: Resource Development
stage.description: The attacker develops custom tools to aid in the attack.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2023-29300 (Suggested): Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for code execution.
stage.description: The attacker exploits a vulnerability in a public-facing application to gain initial access to the system.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2021-39226 (Suggested): Grafana contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows authenticated and unauthenticated users to view and delete all snapshot data, potentially resulting in complete snapshot data loss.
stage.description: The attacker compromises the system through a drive-by download.

stage.name: Execution
stage.technique_name: T1094: Custom Command and Control Protocol
stage.kev: CVE-2018-4878 (Suggested): Adobe Flash Player contains a use-after-free vulnerability that could allow for code execution.
stage.description: The attacker executes custom commands on the compromised system using a custom command and control protocol.

stage.name: Execution
stage.kev: CVE-2016-3643 (Suggested): SolarWinds Virtualization Manager allows for privilege escalation through leveraging a misconfiguration of sudo.
stage.description: The attacker injects malicious code into an OS process.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: The attacker modifies the system partition to maintain persistence.

stage.name: Privilege Escalation
stage.description: The attacker abuses elevation control mechanisms to escalate privileges.

stage.name: Defense Evasion
stage.description: The attacker evades detection by using legitimate capabilities in an unintended manner.

stage.name: Credential Access
stage.description: The attacker performs a brute-force attack on user accounts.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.description: The attacker discovers sensitive information from the credential store through network sniffing.

stage.name: Lateral Movement
stage.description: The attacker moves laterally through the network using remote services.

stage.name: Collection
stage.description: The attacker collects data by creating files locally.

stage.name: Exfiltration
stage.description: The attacker exfiltrates data over alternative protocols.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker causes a denial-of-service condition by disrupting network traffic.

Scenario.summary: This complex attack scenario involves multiple tactics and techniques to gain unauthorized access, escalate privileges, and exfiltrate sensitive data from the energy sector.
